title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Dry Cargo
S&P activity has remained steady and continued at the same pace this week, with a solid flowof transactions taking place and no immediate indications that such conditions are likely to shift any time soon. Demand for dry cargo bulkers and particularly high-quality units built at reputable shipyards, remains strong. On the larger sizes, the Imabari built SEACON AFRICA (ABT 206K DWT, 2006, IMABARI) was sold at USD 22.7 m to Chinese buyers, whilst on Panamaxes, the ORNAK (ABT 79K DWT, 2010, NEW CENTURY) which invited offers on the 27th of Oct, has been sold achieving levels in the Low 11's m.
